_comment: Log message templates. {err} = dynamic error detail from the system.
log_info.storage.root_fallback_warn: Could not resolve root directory, falling back to '.'
log_info.storage.export_source_missing: Export source directory does not exist: {path}
log_info.terminal.enter_failed: Failed to enter terminal raw mode: {err}
log_info.terminal.restore_warn: Terminal restore may have failed — screen may be in raw mode
log_info.input.key_listener_failed: Global key listener failed to start: {err}
log_info.boot.language_fallback: Saved language '{code}' invalid (registry={in_reg}, available={avail}), will re-select
log_info.boot.profile_read_warn: Terminal profile read failed, using defaults
log_info.engine.thread_spawn_fatal: Failed to spawn worker thread — OS resource exhaustion
log_info.engine.channel_send_failed: Task channel disconnected — workers may have crashed
log_info.engine.mutex_poisoned: Mutex poisoned — a previous task panicked
log_info.render.terminal_size_fallback: Terminal size query failed, using fallback 95x24
log_info.render.writer_missing: Terminal writer is missing (headless mode) — rendering skipped
log_info.package.nameless_entry: Directory entry with no file name — skipped
log_info.package.i18n_parse_failed: Failed to parse package i18n JSON: {path}
log_info.package.asset_missing: Package asset file missing or unreadable: {path}
log_info.lua.vm_init_fatal: Failed to create sandboxed Lua VM
log_info.i18n.all_disk_loads_failed: All disk language loads failed, falling back to embedded en_us
log_info.i18n.embedded_fallback_empty: Embedded language fallback for '{code}' is empty!
log_info.ui.scrollbar_char_replaced: Invalid scrollbar character replaced with default
log_info.game.already_running: Game start called while session already running
log_info.overlay.already_active: Overlay start called while already active
